title: Trace Attribution Layer
description: Schema for the Trace Attribution Layer in Earth Brain OS v0.2 Modular Event Architecture. This layer defines provenance tracking, origin attribution, permission status, trace records, audit requirements, attribution routing, and governance hooks.

layer_id.description: Stable identifier for this layer instance.

layer_version.description: Version of this layer schema or implementation profile.

description.description: Short explanation of this Trace Attribution Layer configuration.

trace_sources.description: Sources from which trace or provenance data is collected.

attribution_records.description: Attribution records managed by this layer.

input_events.description: Events or signals accepted by this layer.

output_events.description: Events or signals emitted by this layer.

linked_layers.description: Other Earth Brain OS layers directly connected to this layer.

trace_domains.description: Domains where trace and attribution are required.

attribution_mode.description: Primary attribution mode used by this layer.

permission_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level for permission and attribution handling.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required for attribution disputes or sensitive trace events.

boundary_conditions.description: Boundary conditions limiting trace collection, attribution use, or provenance disclosure.

source_id.description: Stable identifier for the trace source.

source_type.description: Type of source that emits trace information.

source_ref.description: Optional URI, file path, registry key, or source reference.

trust_level.description: Trust level assigned to this trace source.

retention_policy.description: Retention policy for trace records from this source.

integrity_check_required.description: Whether integrity checks are required for this source.

record_id.description: Stable identifier for the attribution record.

usage_context.description: Context in which the attributed origin is used.

confidence_score.description: Confidence score for this attribution record.

linked_trace_ids.description: Trace identifiers linked to this attribution record.

royalty_route_ref.description: Optional royalty or value return route reference.

trace_capture_policy.description: Policy for when and how traces are captured.

trace_linking_method.description: How trace records are linked across events, layers, and systems.

immutability_level.description: Degree to which trace records are immutable.

privacy_filtering.description: How sensitive or personal information is filtered from trace records.

matching_method.description: Method used to match outputs, actions, or events to origins.

conflict_resolution.description: How conflicting attribution claims are resolved.

attribution_output_policy.description: How attribution is exposed, attached, or returned in downstream events.

minimum_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence threshold for verified attribution.

permission_tracking_required.description: Whether permission status must be tracked for attributed sources.

permission_status_policy.description: Policy for representing and updating permission status.

restricted_use_handling.description: How restricted, licensed, or permission-required sources are handled.

violation_response.description: Response when permission or attribution requirements are violated.

permission_status_values.description: Allowed permission status values used by this layer.

audit_required.description: Whether trace and attribution records require audit.

audit_method.description: Audit method used by this layer.

audit_report_ref.description: Optional reference to audit report format or location.

failure_modes.description: Known trace or attribution failure modes to monitor.

direction.description: Direction of the event relative to this layer.

schema_ref.description: Optional schema reference for this event.

layer_id.description: Referenced Earth Brain OS layer identifier.

relationship.description: Relationship between this layer and the referenced layer.

trace_required.description: Whether this layer must produce trace records.

origin_attribution_required.description: Whether origin attribution must be preserved.

permission_status_required.description: Whether permission status must be recorded.

audit_logging_required.description: Whether audit-relevant operations must be logged.

provenance_fields.description: Required provenance fields for trace and attribution records.

retention_policy.description: Trace retention policy for this layer.

human_review_boundary.description: Boundary condition that triggers human review.

policy_refs.description: Policy documents, rules, or schemas applied to this layer.

license_policy_refs.description: License, permission, or attribution policy references.

royalty_policy_refs.description: Royalty, circulation, or value-return policy references.

escalation_channels.description: Channels or layers used for escalation.
